violations.description: FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor areas in dry-storage need routine cleaning. Floor insde large walkin freezer needs routine cleaning. Floor inside Dairy walkin cooler needs cleaning. Ceiling fans in restrooms need cleaning.
